# platform

```go
import "github.com/retr0h/osapi/pkg/sdk/platform"
```

Package platform provides cross\-platform detection for OSAPI providers. The agent uses this package to select the correct provider variant \(ubuntu, darwin, or generic linux\).

## Index

- [Variables](<#variables>)
- [func Detect\(\) string](<#Detect>)


## Variables

<a name="HostInfoFn"></a>HostInfoFn is the function used to retrieve host information. Override in tests to simulate different platforms.

```go
var HostInfoFn = host.Info
```

<a name="Detect"></a>
## func [Detect](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/pkg/sdk/platform/platform.go#L38>)

```go
func Detect() string
```

Detect returns the normalized platform name for provider selection. Returns "ubuntu", "darwin", or "" \(generic linux/unknown\).
